scenarios.name: Freelancer blog post audit script
scenarios.rationale: Treatment hits the exact endpoints /api/v1/scan/ai and /api/v1/scan/plag, the X-OAI-API-KEY header, the documented flagging threshold (AI >= 0.5 or plagiarism >= 20%), and runs the two scans in parallel; baseline gestures at the API but uses wrong auth scheme and invents endpoints.

scenarios.name: Bulk SEO content originality run with credit budgeting
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses GET /api/v1/account/credits/balance, the ~1-credit-per-100-words heuristic, storeScan: false, and handles HTTP 402/429 explicitly; baseline guesses at a balance endpoint and lacks the documented credit math.
